titleStmt.title: SII 25.112: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 112. (A.R. No. 112 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Agastyēśvara shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Dakshiṇāyana śu 8, Monday, Viśākha regularly correspond to 1530 A.D., August 1.

It records the sale of one mā of land made in the presence of the mūlaparushai-mahāsabhai of Tiruppattūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu by a certain Bhāskara-śarman, son of Śrīsthalīśa-śarman, after receiving the land value of 20 paṇam from Tiruvaraṅgapperumāḷāvuḍaiyār, the kiḻār of Viḷaṅguḍi in Kulaśēkharapaṭṭaṇam, the city of Aruviyūr in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. The person who sold these lands is stated to have received the same as gift from a certain Veṅgaḷa-nāyaka on the occasion of a solar eclipse.

The kiḻār is stated to have invested the money on the purchase of the lands for providing two sandhi lamps to god Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār and goddess Śivakāmasundari and also for providing food-offerings to god Vijayavanda-piḷḷaiyār of the temple. The purchaser is said to have set up these two lamps for his own merit.

The donor Veṅgaḷa-nāyaka figuring in this record is probably identical with his namesake who is mentioned as the father of Śiṅgama-nāyaka in a record of Kṛishṇarāya from the same place (vide No. 91 of 1908).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī manmamahāmaṇḍaliśvaran hariyarāya vibhāḍan [śrīvi]rapradāpa Accutadeva
mahārāya[ rpra] dhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 Itan
mel cellāniṉṟa vikiṟiti samvatsarattu dakṣaṇāya nattu siṅha nā
yiṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum somavāram viśāka nakṣatramum peṟṟa puṇya
kālattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḻuṉāṭṭu brahmadeśam ciṅkavaḻuṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirupputtūr mulavaruṣa mahā
sabhaiyil Ātraiya gotrattu Āgnevaiśya sūtrattu śrī sdhaliśśarmman putran bhāskaraśśa
rmman Iṉṉāṭṭu Ariviyūr nakaramāṉa kulacekarapaṭṭaṇattu viḷāṅkuṭikiḷavaṉ
tiruvaraṅkap perumāḷ Āvuṭaiyār Iṉṉāṭṭu tirupputtūr tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār
caṉṉatiyilum civakāma cavuntariyār caṉṉatiyilum taṉṉuya taṉmamāka vaitta cantiyā
tipamiraṇṭukku nāṉmuṉṉāḷ sūryyagrahaṇa puṇṇiya kālattilē kaiyil taṉmatāṇa
māka peṟṟuṭaiy Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai neṭumarattu vayalil vāḷaiyamāṇikkam 2 tmakha Itaṉ vaṭameṟ
ku parutti cey varaiyil rūpāy Āka rūpāy ¿ Iṉ nilam Orumāvum Ivaṟku vilaiyāka viṟṟu nāṉ Ivar kaiyil
paṟṟikoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācāl vācipaṭāta cakkaram ø 2 10 Ippaṇam Irupatum paṟṟikoṇṭu Iṉṉilam
vāḷaiyamāṇikkattile Ivar Iṭṭa tiruviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum veṇṭum Eṇṇai mutal celvatā
katirunāmattuk kāṇiyāk kalveṭṭikuṭutteṉ Ituvum parutti ceyvaraiyil rūpāy ¿ nattatu
tarai Uyyavanta piḷḷaiyāṟku tiruvamutukku Ivar viṭṭapaṭiyāle
cantirātittiyavaṟcela kalveṭṭi kuṭutteṉ bhāskara bhaṭṭaṉeṉ Iṉṉila
ttukkup perunāṉkellai Āvaṉa kiḻpāṟkellai puḷiyañ ceykku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai toṭṭac ceykku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭakku paṭuttac ceykku teṟkum Āka Icaitta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷ p
paṭṭa Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ Ittiruviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum mutalākavum piḷḷaiyāṟku tiruvamutupaṭi mutalukkum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka ntyādityavaṟcella
Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Iṉṉimantaṅkaḷ cellap paṇṇuvatākak kalveṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Ittiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉāṟkum civakāma saundayyārkkum
Ippiḷḷaiyāṟkum Āvuṭaiyāṉeṉ U heśvara rakṣai § Idharmmattai rakṣippār śrī pādaṅkaḷ Eṉtalaimele śubhamastu
svadattā dbiguṇam puṇyam paradattānu pālanam . ttāpahāreṇasva bhavet .§
Digital edition of SII 25.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
